_note: Way-B model-INDEPENDENT gold standard. Proposed by assistant from deterministic diffs; collapses paired add/del of the same edit into one change, drops news-feed churn and garbled fragments. AWAITING human sign-off (flip/add/remove freely). 'real' = author edit a reader would notice. (M) = added manually (real change the capped diff under-surfaced).
criterion: Count each substantive author edit ONCE. Do NOT count individual rotating news/blog/tweet items; DO count 'a news/section appeared' once, redesigns, number/fact/policy/feature changes.

realChanges.desc: Upcoming-conference info rolled forward (JCDL 2015 -> 2022 Cologne -> 2024 Hong Kong)
Conference-proposals call year advanced (2023 -> 2025 and beyond)
Best-paper award listing replaced (2015 Vannevar Bush awards removed)
D-Lib Magazine suspended publication of new issues (July 2017)
Added Alliance/funding acknowledgements (Crossref, Hesburgh Libraries) on move to sponsor-supported OA
Free-ebook count grew (46,000 -> 50,000 -> 55,000)
Anti-treaty (TPP) banner and self-publishing-portal link removed
Added 'Top 100 Books and Authors' and errata-reporting links
Added donation appeal
Long 'about/vision' essay content (right-to-remember, economy, etc.) removed in homepage redesign
Collection item count grew (8,417,033 -> 14,527,859)
Featured apps changed (DPLA Images, DPLA by County/State added; Visual Search prototype removed)
Site redesigned / new website launched (Mar 2018)
'My Lists' feature added
Homepage welcome/tagline reworded (to 'Welcome to Europeana / Discover inspiring cultural heritage...')
SIGIR Academy established (new honor/recognition program announced)
New SIGIR Tokyo Chapter formed
TIST EiC / CHIIR descriptive content removed in restructure
SIGIR Early Career Researcher Awards established (added 2026-06-23 on re-verify)
Guidance updated from WCAG 2.0 to WCAG 2.1
Added 'Making Content Usable for People with Cognitive and Learning Disabilities' guidance
Privacy policy substantially expanded (new sections: model-training data, user content, communication info, analytics, de-identified data, individual rights)
Site redesigned; content restructured (mission/Office of the Librarian/Outreach added; Formats list, Popular links, Welcome message removed)
Documentation section reorganized/renamed (Tech documentation -> Documentation)
Page updated with ETD 2019/2020 symposium information (new conference cycle content)
'ADA Enforcement Activities' section added
Homepage redesigned (new search + 'New on ADA.gov')
'Olmstead: Community Integration' featured topic added
Homepage redesigned around Open-Access mission + journal listing
COVID-19 research updates announcement added
'Published Peer Review' transparency feature added
Guest login option added ('log in as a guest')
Funding-model statement changed (now independent, donation-funded)
Cookie-consent notice added
